title: Struisies shine at Eisteddfod
description: OUDTSHOORN NEWS - Six talented learners from...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - Six talented learners from Oudtshoorn High School (Struisies) have qualified for the national round of the Allegretto Inter Provincial Eisteddfod. The national round will take place on 6 and 7 September.","html":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - Six talented learners from Oudtshoorn High School (Struisies) have qualified for the national round of the Allegretto Inter Provincial Eisteddfod. The national round will take place on 6 and 7 September."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The Oudtshoorn learners impressed judges in the English Division with their remarkable versatility, entering a wide range of categories."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"These included debating, poetry recitation, creative writing, and visual art.","html":"These included debating, poetry recitation, creative writing, and visual art."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The learners who represented the school were Onalerona Mokgoje (debate), Talia Salemane (debate and prepared reading), Kay Ann de Jager (poetry reading and radical debate), Carson-Lee Martin (prepared reading), Nerine van der Merwe (visual art) and Christopher Moos (debate).","html":"The learners who represented the school were Onalerona Mokgoje (debate), Talia Salemane (debate and prepared reading), Kay Ann de Jager (poetry reading and radical debate), Carson-Lee Martin (prepared reading), Nerine van der Merwe (visual art) and Christopher Moos (debate)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Allegretto Eisteddfod is a well-respected platform that highlights excellence in the performing and visual arts. It offers learners from across South Africa the opportunity to showcase their talents on a national stage while developing confidence, creativity and communication skills.","html":"The Allegretto Eisteddfod is a well-respected platform that highlights excellence in the performing and visual arts. It offers learners from across South Africa the opportunity to showcase their talents on a national stage while developing confidence, creativity and communication skills."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘Ons bring jou die nuutste Tuinroete, Hessequa, Karoo nuus’","html":"‘Ons bring jou die nuutste Tuinroete, Hessequa, Karoo nuus’"}]
